---
title: "DEA_Analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-27"
---


```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
################################################################################
# SECTION 1: Data Loading and Preprocessing
################################################################################
library(rms)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(MASS)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(UpSetR)
library(ggthemes)
library(cowplot)
library(reshape2)
library(edgeR)
library(limma)
library(BRETIGEA)
library(naturalsort)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggsci)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(readr)
library(SuperExactTest)
library(ComplexUpset) 
```

```{r}
# SECTION 1.1 DATA LOADING
# read gene expression count matrix
counts <- read.delim("~/Downloads/ROSMAP_Filtered_counts_(greater_than_1cpm).tsv", check.names = FALSE)
# head(counts) # sample id (510_120515), can be matched to specimenID
# counts: rows = genes, columns = samples
gene_id <- counts[[1]]
#generate a counts matrix because limma Voom uses numeric matrix
counts_mat <- as.matrix((counts[, -1]))
rownames(counts_mat) <- gene_id
sample_id <- colnames(counts_mat) # remove the first column which is not a sample
# nrow(counts) #18859

# read quality metrics data file
gene_metric <- read.table("~/Downloads/qualityMetrics.csv", header = TRUE, sep ="", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
# dim(gene_metric) # 1118 23
# head(gene_metric)
qc <- gene_metric[, c("Sample", "PCT_RIBOSOMAL_BASES", "PCT_CODING_BASES", "PCT_UTR_BASES", "ESTIMATED_LIBRARY_SIZE", "MEDIAN_CV_COVERAGE", "RinScore", "Batch")]

# read ensembl gene reference information (contains "all_genes" object)
load("~/Downloads/all_genes_ensembl.RData")
# head(all_genes)

# read metadata that can bridge the sample_id in gene expression counts with proj_id from phenotype data
metadata1 <- read.csv("~/Downloads/ROSMAP_clinical.csv")
# head(metadata1) # has columns representing projid(10101589), individualID(R6939144)
projid1 <- metadata1$projid
indiv_id1 <- metadata1$individualID

metadata2 <- read.csv("~/Downloads/ROSMAP_biospecimen_metadata.csv") 
# head(metadata2) #individualID(R1743384), specimenID (190403-B4-A_R1743384)
metadata2_dlpfc <- subset(metadata2, tissue == "dorsolateral prefrontal cortex")
speci_id2 <- metadata2_dlpfc$specimenID
indiv_id2 <- metadata2_dlpfc$individualID
# nrow(metadata2) # 13235
# nrow(metadata2_dlpfc) # 7660

# For each sample ID from the gene count matrix, the row of speci_id2 it appears in
ind_sample_to_meta2 <- match(sample_id, speci_id2) 

# build a table that links sample_id -> speci_id -> indiv_id
sample_map <- data.frame(
  sample_id = sample_id,
  specimenID = speci_id2[ind_sample_to_meta2],
  individualID = indiv_id2[ind_sample_to_meta2],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# drop the sample that didn't match metadata 2 (ind_sample_to_meta2 may contain n/a if not match)
sample_map <- sample_map[!is.na(sample_map$individualID), ]
# nrow(sample_map) #1092

# give the index of indiv_id1 that match with indiv_id2
ind_indiv_to_meta1 <- match(sample_map$individualID, indiv_id1) 
# add projid to sample_map
sample_map$projid <- projid1[ind_indiv_to_meta1]
sample_map <- sample_map[!is.na(sample_map$projid), ]
sample_map <- merge(
  sample_map,
  qc,
  by.x = "projid",
  by.y = "Sample",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# read phenotype data (include caa_4gp, arteriol_scler, cvda_4gp2, ci_num2_mct, ci_num2_gct)
sf <- read.csv("~/Downloads/dataset_978_basic_04-21-2023.csv")
sf1 <- read.csv("~/Downloads/dataset_978_long_04-21-2023.csv")
# head(sf) # has projid
pheno_keep <- c("projid", "caa_4gp", "arteriol_scler", "cvda_4gp2", "ci_num2_mct", "ci_num2_gct", "msex", "pmi", "age_death", "apoe_genotype", "ad_reagan", "smoking", "ldai_bl", "educ")
sf_sub <- sf[, pheno_keep, drop = FALSE] # drop = FALSE ensures that the sample with phenotype not recorded was not removed by filled with NA
sf1_sub <- sf1[, c("projid", "bmi"), drop = FALSE]
# create a sample metadata table that only include the ids for matched samples
sample_meta <- merge(
  sample_map,
  sf_sub,
  by = "projid",
  all.x = TRUE
)
sample_meta <- merge(
  sample_meta,
  sf1_sub,
  by = "projid",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# Preprocess covariates
# apoe_genotype is recorded as {22,23,24,33,34,44} so we need to make it binary for covariate
sample_meta$APOE_e4_carrier <- ifelse(sample_meta$apoe_genotype %in% c(24, 34, 44), 1,
                            ifelse(sample_meta$apoe_genotype %in% c(22, 23, 33), 0, NA))
sample_meta$APOE_e4_carrier <- factor(sample_meta$APOE_e4_carrier, levels = c(0,1))
# dim(sample_meta) 

# Batch is not recorded as covariates so need to convert to factors
sample_meta$Batch <- factor(sample_meta$Batch)
```

```{r}
# sex, age death (mean, median), educ, pmi, smoking, alcohol, phenotype (stage proportion)
head(d$samples)
nrow(d$samples)
sum(d$samples$ci_num2_mct== "1", na.rm = TRUE)
length(d$samples)
mean(d$samples$age_death)
median(d$samples$age_death)
```

```{r}
# SECTION 1.2 DATA PROCESSING

# generate a new count matrix that only include matched samples
keeped_samples <- intersect(colnames(counts_mat), sample_meta$sample_id)
counts_mat2 <- counts_mat[, keeped_samples, drop = FALSE] # 1092 patients included

#generate DGEList
d <- DGEList(counts = counts_mat2)
d$samples$sample_id <- colnames(d$counts)

# make sure sample_meta rows are in the same order as d samples
ord <- match(d$samples$sample_id, sample_meta$sample_id)
d$samples <- cbind(d$samples, sample_meta[ord, , drop = FALSE])

# dim(d) # 18859 1092
```

```{r}
### Voom and MDS plot
options(repr.plot.width = 13, repr.plot.height = 6)
v0 <- voom(d, plot = TRUE)
# no need of applying cut off because data is already filtered
# Voom plot converts your raw counts into log2-counts per million (logCPM) and estimates a mean–variance relationship
# x-axis: average expression (typically average logCPM)
# y-axis: the estimated variance (or equivalently the square-root of the variance / SD trend) across genes
# A fitted trend line showing how variance changes with expression

# visualize MDS
options(repr.plot.width = 8, repr.plot.height = 8)
# use the top 5000 most variable genes (top=5000) to compute distances
plotMDS(d, top = 5000, labels = d$samples$msex) 
# MDS plot visualizes how similar samples are based on expression profiles
# Run MDS and capture the coordinates
```

```{r}
# SECTION 1.3 PCA plot

# for visualization, estimate cell type proportions in whole sample
options(repr.plot.width = 10, repr.plot.height = 5)

# First, normalize the gene expresssion for a more reliable cell type proportion estimates
d_norm <- calcNormFactors(d) # calculate normalization factors
v_cells <- voom(d_norm, plot = TRUE) # apply voom transformation
# v_cells is now an EList, v_cells$E is logCPM expression, v_cells$weights is weight for each gene x sample

# Ensure rownames are gene symbols for brainCell()
gene_ids <- rownames(v_cells$E)

gene_symbols <- all_genes$external_gene_name[match(gene_ids, all_genes$ensembl_gene_id)]

# remove non-recognizable genes
keep <- !is.na(gene_symbols) & gene_symbols != ""
v_cells$E <- v_cells$E[keep, , drop = FALSE]
v_cells$weights <- v_cells$weights[keep, , drop = FALSE]

#update rownaems with gene symbols
rownames(v_cells$E) <- gene_symbols[keep]

#estimate the cell type proportion based on gene counts (neuron, astrocyte, microglia, oligodendrocyte, OPC, endothelial)
ctps <- brainCells(v_cells$E, species = "human" , nMarker = 500)
ctps_df <- as.data.frame(ctps) # deconvolution using BRETIGEA with 500 marker genes
# Now ctps_df is a data frame where row = sample, column represents the proportion of each cell type
# Convert this wide format to a long format
ctps_df$participant <- rownames(ctps_df)
ctps_melt <- reshape2::melt(ctps_df,id.vars = "participant")
names(ctps_melt)[2] <- "cell"

#create a bar graph to show cell type proportion
ggplot(data=ctps_melt, aes(x=participant, y=abs(value), fill=cell))+ geom_bar(position = "fill",stat="identity")

# PCA plot: answer How do samples differ in their cellular composition
# remove the participant column, leaving only numeric column for PCA plot
res.pca <- FactoMineR::PCA(ctps_df[, setdiff(names(ctps_df), "participant")])
options(repr.plot.width = 8, repr.plot.height = 6)
plot(res.pca, choix = "ind", label = "none")
# PCA individuals plot: each point = one sample, distance shows cellular composition difference

options(repr.plot.width = 8, repr.plot.height = 8)
plot(res.pca, choix = "var")
# PCA Variables plot: tells you which cell types drive each PC.
# Longer arrow → cell type strongly contributes to variance
# Cell types pointing in the same direction are positively correlated

```

```{r}
################################################################################
# SECTION 2: Regression Analysis
################################################################################
### SECTION 2.1 Design Matrix


### Function build design matrices
build_design_matrix <- function(d, pheno_var, pheno_label, save_prefix) {
  
  # 1. Subset samples
  d_ph <- d[, d$samples[[pheno_var]] != "Null" & !is.na(d$samples[[pheno_var]])]
  n_before_ph <- ncol(d_ph)
  
  # 2. make the variables factor
  d_ph$samples[[pheno_var]] <- factor(d_ph$samples[[pheno_var]])
  
  # 3. Model design 
  design_ph_basic <- model.matrix(
    as.formula(paste("~ lib.size + RinScore + pmi + Batch + age_death + msex +", pheno_var)),
    data = d_ph$samples
  )
  n_ph_basic <- nrow(design_ph_basic)
  
  design_ph_lifestyle <- model.matrix(
    as.formula(paste("~ lib.size + RinScore + pmi + Batch + age_death + msex + smoking + bmi + ldai_bl + educ +", pheno_var)),
    data = d_ph$samples
  )
  n_ph_lifestyle <- nrow(design_ph_lifestyle)
  
  design_ph_AD <- model.matrix(
    as.formula(paste("~ lib.size + RinScore + pmi + Batch + age_death + msex + ad_reagan + apoe_genotype + smoking + bmi + ldai_bl + educ +", pheno_var)),
    data = d_ph$samples
  )
  n_ph_AD <- nrow(design_ph_AD)
  
  design_ph_path <- model.matrix(
  ~ lib.size + RinScore + pmi + Batch + age_death + msex +
    ad_reagan + apoe_genotype +
    smoking + bmi + ldai_bl + educ +
    caa_4gp + cvda_4gp2 + arteriol_scler + ci_num2_mct + ci_num2_gct,
  data = d_ph$samples
)
  n_ph_path <- nrow(design_ph_path)
  
  # 4-8. Subset, droplevels, refit the model with new sample size, calculate normalization factor and voom 
  keep_samples <- intersect(rownames(design_ph_basic), colnames(d_ph))
  d_ph_basic <- d_ph[, keep_samples]
  d_ph_basic$samples$Batch <- droplevels(d_ph_basic$samples$Batch)
  design_ph_basic <- model.matrix(
    as.formula(paste("~ lib.size + RinScore + pmi + Batch + age_death + msex +", pheno_var)),
    data = d_ph_basic$samples
  )
  d_ph_basic <- calcNormFactors(d_ph_basic)
  v_ph_basic <- voom(d_ph_basic, design_ph_basic)
  
  keep_samples <- intersect(rownames(design_ph_lifestyle), colnames(d_ph))
  d_ph_lifestyle <- d_ph[, keep_samples]
  d_ph_lifestyle$samples$Batch <- droplevels(d_ph_lifestyle$samples$Batch)
  design_ph_lifestyle <- model.matrix(
    as.formula(paste("~ lib.size + RinScore + pmi + Batch + age_death + msex + smoking + bmi + ldai_bl + educ +", pheno_var)),
    data = d_ph_lifestyle$samples
  )
  d_ph_lifestyle <- calcNormFactors(d_ph_lifestyle)
  v_ph_lifestyle <- voom(d_ph_lifestyle, design_ph_lifestyle)
  
  keep_samples <- intersect(rownames(design_ph_AD), colnames(d_ph))
  d_ph_AD <- d_ph[, keep_samples]
  d_ph_AD$samples$Batch <- droplevels(d_ph_AD$samples$Batch)
  design_ph_AD <- model.matrix(
    as.formula(paste("~ lib.size + RinScore + pmi + Batch + age_death + msex + ad_reagan + apoe_genotype + smoking + bmi + ldai_bl + educ +", pheno_var)),
    data = d_ph_AD$samples
  )
  d_ph_AD <- calcNormFactors(d_ph_AD)
  v_ph_AD <- voom(d_ph_AD, design_ph_AD)
  
  keep_samples <- intersect(rownames(design_ph_path), colnames(d_ph))
  d_ph_path <- d_ph[, keep_samples]
  d_ph_path$samples$Batch <- droplevels(d_ph_path$samples$Batch)
  design_ph_path <- model.matrix(
  ~ lib.size + RinScore + pmi + Batch + age_death + msex +
    ad_reagan + apoe_genotype +
    smoking + bmi + ldai_bl + educ +
    caa_4gp + cvda_4gp2 + arteriol_scler + ci_num2_mct + ci_num2_gct,
  data = d_ph_path$samples
)

  d_ph_path <- calcNormFactors(d_ph_path)
  v_ph_path <- voom(d_ph_path, design_ph_path)
  
  # 9. Sample summary 
  sample_summary_ph <- data.frame(
    phenotype = rep(pheno_label, 5),
    model = c("original", "basic", "lifestyle", "AD", "pathologies"),
    n = c(n_before_ph, n_ph_basic, n_ph_lifestyle, n_ph_AD, n_ph_path)
  )
  
  # Return everything in a list
  out <- list(
    d_ph = d_ph,
    d_ph_basic = d_ph_basic,
    d_ph_lifestyle = d_ph_lifestyle,
    d_ph_AD = d_ph_AD,
    d_ph_path = d_ph_path,
    
    v_ph_basic = v_ph_basic,
    v_ph_lifestyle = v_ph_lifestyle,
    v_ph_AD = v_ph_AD,
    v_ph_path = v_ph_path,
    
    design_ph_basic = design_ph_basic,
    design_ph_lifestyle = design_ph_lifestyle,
    design_ph_AD = design_ph_AD,
    design_ph_path = design_ph_path,
    
    sample_summary_ph = sample_summary_ph
  )
  
  # Save to RDS
  saveRDS(out, paste0("output/phenotype_objects_", save_prefix, ".rds"))
  
  return(out)
}

caa_design <- build_design_matrix(d, "caa_4gp", "CAA", "caa")
art_design <- build_design_matrix(d, "arteriol_scler", "ART", "art")
cvda_design <- build_design_matrix(d, "cvda_4gp2", "CVDA", "cvda")
gct_design <- build_design_matrix(d, "ci_num2_gct", "GCT", "gct")
mct_design <- build_design_matrix(d, "ci_num2_mct", "MCT", "mct")

```

```{r}
### Load design objects
caa_design <- readRDS("output/phenotype_objects_caa.rds")
art_design <- readRDS("output/phenotype_objects_art.rds")
cvda_design <- readRDS("output/phenotype_objects_cvda.rds")
gct_design <- readRDS("output/phenotype_objects_gct.rds")
mct_design <- readRDS("output/phenotype_objects_mct.rds")
```


```{r}
### SECTION 2.2 Limma/voom Pipeline

## Helper function 
cell_correct_voom <- function(v_obj, all_genes) {
  v_obj_cells <- v_obj
  original_ensembl <- rownames(v_obj_cells$E)
  genesymbols <- all_genes$external_gene_name[match(rownames(v_obj_cells$E), all_genes$ensembl_gene_id)]
  rownames(v_obj_cells$E) <- genesymbols
  keep <- !is.na(genesymbols)
  E_keep <- v_obj_cells$E[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  W_keep <- v_obj_cells$weights[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  ens_keep <- original_ensembl[keep]
  
  adj <- adjustBrainCells(E_keep, species = "human", verbose = FALSE)
  
  v_obj_cells$E <- adj$expression
  v_obj_cells$weights <- W_keep
  rownames(v_obj_cells$E) <- ens_keep
  
  return (v_obj_cells)
}

# Helper Function
make_toptable <- function(eb, design, d_sub, pheno_name, all_genes) {
  coef_names <- colnames(design)
  pheno_coefs <- coef_names[grepl(paste0("^", pheno_name), coef_names)]

  res_list <- list()

  for (coef in pheno_coefs) {
    tt <- topTable(eb,
                   coef = coef,
                   number = Inf, # include all genes not just top 10
                   sort.by = "p" # sort by p value with the smallest on top
    )

    # standard error
    tt$se <- eb$stdev.unscaled[, coef] * sqrt(eb$s2.post)

    # metadata
    tt$n <- nrow(d_sub$samples)
    tt$gene <- rownames(tt)

    # annotations
    ind <- match(tt$gene, all_genes$ensembl_gene_id)
    tt$hugo <- all_genes$external_gene_name[ind]
    tt$chr <- all_genes$chromosome_name[ind]
    tt$pos <- all_genes$start_position[ind]

    res_list[[coef]] <- tt
  }

  return(res_list)
}

### main function for modeling fitting
run_DE_models <- function(results, pheno_name, save_prefix, all_genes) {
  
  # BASIC MODEL
  v_use_basic <- cell_correct_voom(results$v_ph_basic, all_genes)
  fit_basic   <- lmFit(v_use_basic, results$design_ph_basic, method = "robust", maxit = 20000)
  eb_basic    <- eBayes(fit_basic, robust = TRUE)
  
  ttlist_basic <- make_toptable(
    eb         = eb_basic,
    design     = results$design_ph_basic,
    d_sub      = results$d_ph_basic,
    pheno_name = pheno_name,
    all_genes  = all_genes
  )
  
  tt_all_basic <- NULL
  for (nm in names(ttlist_basic)) {
    tt_one <- ttlist_basic[[nm]]
    
    if (is.null(tt_all_basic)) {
      names(tt_one)[1:8] <- paste0(names(tt_one)[1:8], "_", nm)
      tt_all_basic <- tt_one
    } else {
      tt_one <- tt_one %>%
        dplyr::select(gene, logFC, AveExpr, t, P.Value, adj.P.Val, B) %>%
        dplyr::rename_with(~paste0(.x, "_", nm), -gene)
      tt_all_basic <- merge(tt_all_basic, tt_one, by = "gene", all = TRUE)
    }
  }
  
  # LIFESTYLE MODEL
  v_use_lifestyle <- cell_correct_voom(results$v_ph_lifestyle, all_genes)
  fit_lifestyle   <- lmFit(v_use_lifestyle, results$design_ph_lifestyle, method = "robust", maxit = 20000)
  eb_lifestyle    <- eBayes(fit_lifestyle, robust = TRUE)
  
  ttlist_lifestyle <- make_toptable(
    eb         = eb_lifestyle,
    design     = results$design_ph_lifestyle,
    d_sub      = results$d_ph_lifestyle,
    pheno_name = pheno_name,
    all_genes  = all_genes
  )
  
  tt_all_lifestyle <- NULL
  for (nm in names(ttlist_lifestyle)) {
    tt_one <- ttlist_lifestyle[[nm]]
    
    if (is.null(tt_all_lifestyle)) {
      names(tt_one)[1:8] <- paste0(names(tt_one)[1:8], "_", nm)
      tt_all_lifestyle <- tt_one
    } else {
      tt_one <- tt_one %>%
        dplyr::select(gene, logFC, AveExpr, t, P.Value, adj.P.Val, B) %>%
        dplyr::rename_with(~paste0(.x, "_", nm), -gene)
      tt_all_lifestyle <- merge(tt_all_lifestyle, tt_one, by = "gene", all = TRUE)
    }
  }
  
  # AD MODEL
  v_use_AD <- cell_correct_voom(results$v_ph_AD, all_genes)
  fit_AD   <- lmFit(v_use_AD, results$design_ph_AD, method = "robust", maxit = 20000)
  eb_AD    <- eBayes(fit_AD, robust = TRUE)
  
  ttlist_AD <- make_toptable(
    eb         = eb_AD,
    design     = results$design_ph_AD,
    d_sub      = results$d_ph_AD,
    pheno_name = pheno_name,
    all_genes  = all_genes
  )
  
  tt_all_AD <- NULL
  for (nm in names(ttlist_AD)) {
    tt_one <- ttlist_AD[[nm]]
    
    if (is.null(tt_all_AD)) {
      names(tt_one)[1:8] <- paste0(names(tt_one)[1:8], "_", nm)
      tt_all_AD <- tt_one
    } else {
      tt_one <- tt_one %>%
        dplyr::select(gene, logFC, AveExpr, t, P.Value, adj.P.Val, B) %>%
        dplyr::rename_with(~paste0(.x, "_", nm), -gene)
      tt_all_AD <- merge(tt_all_AD, tt_one, by = "gene", all = TRUE)
    }
  }
  
  # PATH MODEL
  v_use_path <- cell_correct_voom(results$v_ph_path, all_genes)
  fit_path   <- lmFit(v_use_path, results$design_ph_path, method = "robust", maxit = 20000)
  eb_path    <- eBayes(fit_path, robust = TRUE)
  
  ttlist_path <- make_toptable(
    eb         = eb_path,
    design     = results$design_ph_path,
    d_sub      = results$d_ph_path,
    pheno_name = pheno_name,
    all_genes  = all_genes
  )
  
  tt_all_path <- NULL
  for (nm in names(ttlist_path)) {
    tt_one <- ttlist_path[[nm]]
    
    if (is.null(tt_all_path)) {
      names(tt_one)[1:8] <- paste0(names(tt_one)[1:8], "_", nm)
      tt_all_path <- tt_one
    } else {
      tt_one <- tt_one %>%
        dplyr::select(gene, logFC, AveExpr, t, P.Value, adj.P.Val, B) %>%
        dplyr::rename_with(~paste0(.x, "_", nm), -gene)
      tt_all_path <- merge(tt_all_path, tt_one, by = "gene", all = TRUE)
    }
  }
  
  # COMBINE ALL MODELS INTO ONE LIST
  out <- list(
    basic     = tt_all_basic,
    lifestyle = tt_all_lifestyle,
    AD        = tt_all_AD,
    path      = tt_all_path
  )
  
  # Save ONE RDS file
  saveRDS(out, paste0("output/5_pheno/tt_all_", save_prefix, ".rds"))
  
  return(out)
}


tt_all_caa <- run_DE_models(caa_design, "caa_4gp", "caa", all_genes)
tt_all_art <- run_DE_models(art_design, "arteriol_scler", "art", all_genes)
tt_all_cvda <- run_DE_models(cvda_design, "cvda_4gp2", "cvda", all_genes)
tt_all_gct <- run_DE_models(gct_design, "ci_num2_gct", "gct", all_genes)
tt_all_mct <- run_DE_models(mct_design, "ci_num2_mct", "mct", all_genes)

```

```{r}
### Load tt_all objects
tt_all_caa <- readRDS("output/5_pheno/tt_all_caa.rds")
tt_all_art <- readRDS("output/5_pheno/tt_all_art.rds")
tt_all_cvda <- readRDS("output/5_pheno/tt_all_cvda.rds")
tt_all_gct <- readRDS("output/5_pheno/tt_all_gct.rds")
tt_all_mct <- readRDS("output/5_pheno/tt_all_mct.rds")
```

```{r}
################################################################################
# SECTION 3: DEG Analysis
##############################################################################
### Section 3.1 Summary Table 

# helper: extract the lists of fdr genes for all contrasts 
extract_deg_lists <- function(tt, pheno_name, fdr, contrasts) {
  out <- vector("list", length(contrasts))
  names(out) <- contrasts
  
  for (cid in contrasts) {
    colname <- paste0("adj.P.Val_", pheno_name, cid)
    if (!colname %in% colnames(tt)) {
      out[[cid]] <- character(0)
      message("did not find that column name for contrast: ", cid)
    } else {
      out[[cid]] <- tt[tt[[colname]] < fdr, "hugo"]
    }
  }
  out
}

summarize_DEGs <- function(tt_all, pheno_name, pheno_label, save_prefix) {
  
  # detect contrasts dynamically
  basic_cols <- colnames(tt_all$basic)
  adj_cols   <- grep(paste0("^adj.P.Val_", pheno_name), basic_cols, value = TRUE)
  
  # extract contrast IDs (e.g., "1", "2", "3")
  contrasts <- sub(paste0("adj.P.Val_", pheno_name), "", adj_cols)

  # extract DEG lists for each model and FDR
  basic_05     <- extract_deg_lists(tt_all$basic,     pheno_name, 0.05, contrasts)
  lifestyle_05 <- extract_deg_lists(tt_all$lifestyle, pheno_name, 0.05, contrasts)
  AD_05        <- extract_deg_lists(tt_all$AD,        pheno_name, 0.05, contrasts)
  path_05      <- extract_deg_lists(tt_all$path,      pheno_name, 0.05, contrasts)
  
  basic_10     <- extract_deg_lists(tt_all$basic,     pheno_name, 0.10, contrasts)
  lifestyle_10 <- extract_deg_lists(tt_all$lifestyle, pheno_name, 0.10, contrasts)
  AD_10        <- extract_deg_lists(tt_all$AD,        pheno_name, 0.10, contrasts)
  path_10      <- extract_deg_lists(tt_all$path,      pheno_name, 0.10, contrasts)
  
  
  # count tables
  count_05 <- data.frame(
    Phenotype = pheno_label,
    fdr_threshold = "0.05",
    Contrast = contrasts,
    Basic_N     = sapply(basic_05,     length),
    Lifestyle_N = sapply(lifestyle_05, length),
    AD_N        = sapply(AD_05,        length),
    Path_N      = sapply(path_05,      length),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  count_10 <- data.frame(
    Phenotype = pheno_label,
    fdr_threshold = "0.10",
    Contrast = contrasts,
    Basic_N     = sapply(basic_10,     length),
    Lifestyle_N = sapply(lifestyle_10, length),
    AD_N        = sapply(AD_10,        length),
    Path_N      = sapply(path_10,      length),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # gene tables
  genes_05 <- data.frame(
    phenotype = pheno_label,
    fdr_threshold = "0.05",
    contrast = contrasts,
    basic     = sapply(basic_05,     function(x) paste(x, collapse = ",")),
    lifestyle = sapply(lifestyle_05, function(x) paste(x, collapse = ",")),
    AD        = sapply(AD_05,        function(x) paste(x, collapse = ",")),
    path      = sapply(path_05,      function(x) paste(x, collapse = ",")),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  genes_10 <- data.frame(
    phenotype = pheno_label,
    fdr_threshold = "0.10",
    contrast = contrasts,
    basic     = sapply(basic_10,     function(x) paste(x, collapse = ",")),
    lifestyle = sapply(lifestyle_10, function(x) paste(x, collapse = ",")),
    AD        = sapply(AD_10,        function(x) paste(x, collapse = ",")),
    path      = sapply(path_10,      function(x) paste(x, collapse = ",")),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # combine into one list
  out <- list(
    count_05 = count_05,
    count_10 = count_10,
    genes_05 = genes_05,
    genes_10 = genes_10
  )
  
  # save to RDS
  saveRDS(out, paste0("output/5_pheno/deg_summary_", save_prefix, ".rds"))
  
  return(out)
}

caa_summary <- summarize_DEGs(tt_all_caa, "caa_4gp", "caa", "caa")
# Result: 
# caa_summary$count_05   # DEG counts at FDR 0.05
# caa_summary$genes_05   # DEG gene lists at FDR 0.05

art_summary  <- summarize_DEGs(tt_all_art,  "arteriol_scler", "art",  "art")
cvda_summary <- summarize_DEGs(tt_all_cvda, "cvda_4gp2",      "cvda", "cvda")
gct_summary  <- summarize_DEGs(tt_all_gct,  "ci_num2_gct",    "gct",  "gct")
mct_summary  <- summarize_DEGs(tt_all_mct,  "ci_num2_mct",    "mct",  "mct")


# Build FDR gene tables (0.05 and 0.10) from summary 
fdrgene_table <- rbind(
  caa_summary$genes_05,
  caa_summary$genes_10,
  art_summary$genes_05,
  art_summary$genes_10,
  cvda_summary$genes_05,
  cvda_summary$genes_10,
  gct_summary$genes_05,
  gct_summary$genes_10,
  mct_summary$genes_05,
  mct_summary$genes_10
)

write.csv(fdrgene_table, "output/all_fdrgene_tables.csv", row.names = FALSE)
fdrgene_table

# Build FDR count tables (0.05 and 0.10) from summary  

fdrgene_count_table <- rbind(
  caa_summary$count_05,
  caa_summary$count_10,
  art_summary$count_05,
  art_summary$count_10,
  cvda_summary$count_05,
  cvda_summary$count_10,
  gct_summary$count_05,
  gct_summary$count_10,
  mct_summary$count_05,
  mct_summary$count_10
)

write.csv(fdrgene_count_table, "output/fdrgene_count_table.csv", row.names = FALSE)
fdrgene_count_table

```


```{r}
### Load summary object
caa_summary <- readRDS("output/5_pheno/deg_summary_caa.rds")
art_summary <- readRDS("output/5_pheno/deg_summary_art.rds")
cvda_summary <- readRDS("output/5_pheno/deg_summary_cvda.rds")
gct_summary <- readRDS("output/5_pheno/deg_summary_gct.rds")
mct_summary <- readRDS("output/5_pheno/deg_summary_mct.rds")
```

```{r}
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
## SECTION 3.2 Stages overlap analysis
## ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
### Visualize overlapped genes across different contrasts in the same model

# Helpers
filter_nonempty <- function(gene_list) {
  gene_list[sapply(gene_list, function(x) length(x) > 0)]
}
get_nonempty_contrasts <- function(fdr_list, model, pheno) {
  raw <- fdr_list[[model]][[pheno]]
  filter_nonempty(raw)
}
extract_overlap_genes <- function(gene_list) {
  set_names <- names(gene_list)
  results <- list()
  
  # all combinations of 2 or more sets
  for (k in 2:length(gene_list)) {
    combs <- combn(set_names, k, simplify = FALSE)
    
    for (cmb in combs) {
      overlap <- Reduce(intersect, gene_list[cmb])
      
      results[[paste(cmb, collapse = " & ")]] <- overlap
    }
  }
  
  # convert to data frame
  overlap_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(results), function(nm) {
    genes <- results[[nm]]
    if (length(genes) == 0) return(NULL)
    
    data.frame(
      intersection = nm,
      n_genes = length(genes),
      genes = paste(genes, collapse = ", "),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }))
  
  return(overlap_df)
}
run_overlap_analysis <- function(gene_list, title = NULL) {
  st <- SuperExactTest::supertest(gene_list)
  print(summary(st))
  
  input_matrix <- fromList(gene_list)
  if (!is.null(title)) {
    print(UpSetR::upset(
      input_matrix,
      main.bar.color = "steelblue",
      sets.bar.color = "grey40",
      mainbar.y.label = title,
      sets.x.label = "Set size",
      text.scale = 1.5
    ))
  } else {
    print(UpSetR::upset(input_matrix))
  }
  
  overlap_df <- extract_overlap_genes(gene_list)
  
  invisible(list(
    supertest = st,
    upset_matrix = input_matrix,
    overlap_table = overlap_df
  ))
}

run_all_overlap_analyses <- function(fdr_list, title_prefix = "FDR Analysis") {
  models <- names(fdr_list)   # basic, lifestyle, AD, path
  phenos <- names(fdr_list[[1]])  
  
  results <- list()
  
  for (m in models) {
    for (ph in phenos) {
      message("Processing model: ", m, " | phenotype: ", ph)
      
      gene_sets <- get_nonempty_contrasts(fdr_list, m, ph)
      
      if (length(gene_sets) < 2) {
        message("  Skipping — fewer than 2 non-empty contrasts.")
        next
      }
      
      title <- paste0(title_prefix, ": ", m, " | ", ph)
      results[[m]][[ph]] <- run_overlap_analysis(gene_sets, title = title)
    }
  }
  
  results
}

build_fdr_list_from_summary <- function(summary_genes, pheno_label) {
  models <- c("basic", "lifestyle", "AD", "path")
  contrasts <- summary_genes$contrast
  
  fdr_list <- list()
  
  for (m in models) {
    fdr_list[[m]] <- list()
    fdr_list[[m]][[pheno_label]] <- list()
    
    for (i in seq_along(contrasts)) {
      cid <- contrasts[i]
      gene_string <- summary_genes[[m]][i]
      
      if (is.na(gene_string) || gene_string == "") {
        genes <- character(0)
      } else {
        genes <- unlist(strsplit(gene_string, ","))
        genes <- trimws(genes)
      }
      fdr_list[[m]][[pheno_label]][[cid]] <- genes
    }
  }
  
  return(fdr_list)
}

## Function that compares the overlaps between stages within the same model
run_overlap_pipeline <- function(summary_obj, pheno_label, fdr = 0.05, outdir = "output/overlap_between_stages") {
  dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  summary_genes <- if (fdr == 0.05) summary_obj$genes_05 else summary_obj$genes_10
  
  fdr_list <- build_fdr_list_from_summary(summary_genes, pheno_label)
  
  results <- list()
  models <- names(fdr_list)
  
  for (m in models) {
    gene_sets <- get_nonempty_contrasts(fdr_list, m, pheno_label)
    
    if (length(gene_sets) < 2) {
      message("Skipping ", m, " — fewer than 2 non-empty contrasts.")
      next
    }
    
    title <- paste0("FDR <", fdr, ": ", pheno_label, " | ", m)
    
    plotfile <- file.path(outdir, paste0("stage_overlap_", pheno_label, "_", m, "_fdr", fdr, ".png"))
    csvfile  <- file.path(outdir, paste0("stage_overlap_", pheno_label, "_", m, "_fdr", fdr, "_genes.csv"))
    
    png(plotfile, width = 1600, height = 1200, res = 200)
    res <- run_overlap_analysis(gene_sets, title = title)
    dev.off()
    
    if (!is.null(res$overlap_table) && nrow(res$overlap_table) > 0) {
      write.csv(res$overlap_table, csvfile, row.names = FALSE)
    }
    
    results[[m]] <- res
  }
  
  return(results)
}
overlap_caa_05 <- run_overlap_pipeline(caa_summary, "Cerebral Amyloid Angiopathy", 0.05)
overlap_art_05 <- run_overlap_pipeline(art_summary, "Arteriolosclerosis", 0.05)
overlap_cvda_05 <- run_overlap_pipeline(cvda_summary, "Cerebral Atherosclerosis", 0.05)
# gct and mct are skipped because of too few genes
```

```{r}
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
## SECTION 3.3 Models overlap analysis
## ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
### Section 3.3.1 Visualize the overlap between models within the same phenotype stage

# helper: get non-empty models for a given contrast and phenotype
get_nonempty_models <- function(fdr_list, pheno_label, contrast) {
  models <- names(fdr_list)
  gene_sets <- lapply(models, function(m) fdr_list[[m]][[pheno_label]][[contrast]])
  names(gene_sets) <- models
  # drop empty sets
  gene_sets[sapply(gene_sets, function(x) length(x) > 0)]
}

# Main function: overlap between models at the same contrast
run_model_overlap_pipeline <- function(summary_obj,
                                       pheno_label,
                                       fdr    = 0.05,
                                       outdir = "output/overlap_between_models") {
  dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # 1) pick correct summary table
  summary_genes <- if (fdr == 0.05) summary_obj$genes_05 else summary_obj$genes_10
  
  # 2) build fdr_list
  fdr_list <- build_fdr_list_from_summary(summary_genes, pheno_label)
  
  # 3) loop over contrasts (same outer loop as contrast pipeline)
  contrasts <- summary_genes$contrast
  results   <- list()
  
  for (cid in contrasts) {
    gene_sets <- get_nonempty_models(fdr_list, pheno_label, cid)
    if (length(gene_sets) < 2) {
      message("Skipping contrast ", cid, " — fewer than 2 non-empty models.")
      next
    }
    title   <- paste0("FDR <", fdr, ": ", pheno_label, " | contrast ", cid)
    outfile <- file.path(outdir,
                         paste0("model_overlap_", pheno_label, "_", cid, "_fdr", fdr, ".png"))
    csvfile  <- file.path(outdir, paste0("model_overlap_", pheno_label, "_", cid, "_fdr", fdr, "_genes.csv"))
    
    png(outfile, width = 1600, height = 1200, res = 200)
    results[[cid]] <- run_overlap_analysis(gene_sets, title = title)
    dev.off()
    
    if (!is.null(results[[cid]]$overlap_table) && nrow(results[[cid]]$overlap_table) > 0) {
      write.csv(results[[cid]]$overlap_table, csvfile, row.names = FALSE)
    }
  }
  return(results)
}

model_overlap_caa_05 <- run_model_overlap_pipeline(caa_summary, "Cerebral Amyloid Angiopathy", 0.05)
model_overlap_art_05  <- run_model_overlap_pipeline(art_summary,  "Arteriolosclerosis",  0.05)
model_overlap_cvda_05 <- run_model_overlap_pipeline(cvda_summary, "Cerebral Atherosclerosis", 0.05)
# Skipped for gct and mct because too few fdr genes
```


```{r}
### Section 3.3.2 Visualize overlaps across all phenotype at the same stage for the same model
get_all_genes_for_pheno <- function(summary_pheno, pheno_name) {
  
  # Extract FDR < 0.05 gene tables
  genes_05 <- summary_pheno$genes_05
  
  # Build fdr_list
  fdr_list <- build_fdr_list_from_summary(genes_05, pheno_name)
  
  models <- names(fdr_list)
  
  # Collect ALL genes across all models and all stages
  all_genes <- c()
  
  for (m in models) {
    stages <- names(fdr_list[[m]][[pheno_name]])
    
    for (s in stages) {
      gene_vec <- fdr_list[[m]][[pheno_name]][[s]]
      all_genes <- c(all_genes, gene_vec)
    }
  }
  
  # Return unique genes
  unique(all_genes)
}

run_cross_pheno_union <- function(summary_caa,
                                  summary_cvda,
                                  summary_art,
                                  summary_gct,
                                  summary_mct,
                                  outdir = "output/overlap_between_phenotypes_union") {
  
  dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Get all DE genes per phenotype
  caa_all  <- get_all_genes_for_pheno(summary_caa,  "caa")
  cvda_all <- get_all_genes_for_pheno(summary_cvda, "cvda")
  art_all  <- get_all_genes_for_pheno(summary_art,  "art")
  gct_all <-  get_all_genes_for_pheno(summary_gct,  "gct")
  mct_all <-  get_all_genes_for_pheno(summary_mct,  "mct")
  
  gene_sets <- list(
    Cerebral_Amyloid_Angiopathy  = caa_all,
    Cerebral_Atherosclerosis = cvda_all,
    Arteriolosclerosis  = art_all,
    GCT = gct_all,
    MCT = mct_all
  )
  
  # Remove empty sets
  gene_sets <- gene_sets[sapply(gene_sets, length) > 0]
  
  outfile <- file.path(outdir, "cross_pheno_union_fdr05.png")
  csvfile  <- file.path(outdir, "phenotype_overlap_genes.csv")
  
  png(outfile, width = 1600, height = 1200, res = 200)
  result <- run_overlap_analysis(gene_sets,
                                 title = "Cross-Phenotype Overlap (All DE Genes)")
  dev.off()
  
  if (!is.null(result$overlap_table) && nrow(result$overlap_table) > 0) {
      write.csv(result$overlap_table, csvfile, row.names = FALSE)
    }
  return(result)
}
run_cross_pheno_union(
  summary_caa  = caa_summary,
  summary_cvda = cvda_summary,
  summary_art  = art_summary,
  summary_gct = gct_summary,
  summary_mct = mct_summary
)

# 
# run_cross_pheno_overlap <- function(summary_caa,
#                                     summary_cvda,
#                                     summary_art,
#                                     model,
#                                     stage_index,
#                                     outdir = "output/overlap_between_phenotypes") {
#   
#   dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
#   
#   # ---- 1. Extract FDR 0.05 gene tables ----
#   caa_genes  <- summary_caa$genes_05
#   cvda_genes <- summary_cvda$genes_05
#   art_genes  <- summary_art$genes_05
#   
#   # ---- 2. Build fdr_list for each phenotype ----
#   fdr_caa  <- build_fdr_list_from_summary(caa_genes,  "caa")
#   fdr_cvda <- build_fdr_list_from_summary(cvda_genes, "cvda")
#   fdr_art  <- build_fdr_list_from_summary(art_genes,  "art")
#   
#   # ---- 3. Extract gene sets for the same model + stage ----
#   stage_key <- as.character(stage_index)
#   
#   caa_set  <- fdr_caa[[model]][["caa"]][[stage_key]]
#   cvda_set <- fdr_cvda[[model]][["cvda"]][[stage_key]]
#   art_set  <- fdr_art[[model]][["art"]][[stage_key]]
#   
#   # ---- 4. Build list for overlap ----
#   gene_sets <- list(
#     CAA  = caa_set,
#     CVDA = cvda_set,
#     ART  = art_set
#   )
#   
#   # Remove empty sets
#   gene_sets <- gene_sets[sapply(gene_sets, length) > 0]
#   
#   if (length(gene_sets) < 2) {
#     message("Skipping: fewer than 2 phenotypes have DEGs for model ", model,
#             " stage ", stage_index)
#     return(NULL)
#   }
#   
#   # ---- 5. Save plot ----
#   title <- paste0("Cross-Phenotype Overlap | Model: ", model,
#                   " | Stage: ", stage_index, " | FDR < 0.05")
#   
#   outfile <- file.path(
#     outdir,
#     paste0("cross_pheno_overlap_", model, "_stage", stage_index, "_fdr05.png")
#   )
#

#   result <- run_overlap_analysis(gene_sets, title = title)
#   dev.off()
#   
#   return(result)
# }
# 
# models <- c("basic", "lifestyle", "AD", "path")
# stages <- 1:3
# 
# for (m in models) {
#   for (s in stages) {
#     message("Running cross-phenotype overlap: model = ", m, ", stage = ", s)
#     
#     run_cross_pheno_overlap(
#       summary_caa = caa_summary,
#       summary_cvda = cvda_summary,
#       summary_art = art_summary,
#       model = m,
#       stage_index = s
#     )
#   }
# }
```

```{r}
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
## SECTION 3.4.2 Volcano plots
## ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- 

# helper function: create the volcano plot for all stages of all phenotype, label DEG (fdr < 0.05) in red
pheno_fullname <- c(
  art  = "Arteriolosclerosis",
  caa  = "Cerebral Amyloid Angiopathy",
  cvda = "Cerebral Atherosclerosis",
  gct  = "Gross Infarctions",
  mct  = "Micro Infarctions"
)
create_volcano <- function(tt_model, contrast_name, plot_title) {
  
  p_col   <- paste0("P.Value_", contrast_name)
  fc_col  <- paste0("logFC_", contrast_name)
  adj_col <- paste0("adj.P.Val_", contrast_name)
  
  missing <- setdiff(c(p_col, fc_col, adj_col), colnames(tt_model))
  if (length(missing) > 0) {
    message("Skipping ", contrast_name, " — missing columns: ", paste(missing, collapse = ", "))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  topten <- tt_model$hugo[order(tt_model[[adj_col]])][1:10]
  
  ggplot(tt_model, aes(x = .data[[fc_col]], y = -log10(.data[[p_col]]))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = .data[[adj_col]] < 0.05)) +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = subset(tt_model, hugo %in% topten),
      aes(label = hugo),
      fontface = "italic"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("grey60", "red")) +
    labs(
      title = plot_title,
      x = "Log2 Fold Change",
      y = "-Log10(P-value)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
}

# 1. List of all tt_all objects (one per phenotype)
tt_all_list <- list(
  art  = tt_all_art,
  caa  = tt_all_caa,
  cvda = tt_all_cvda,
  gct  = tt_all_gct,
  mct  = tt_all_mct
)

# 2. For each phenotype, define the contrasts to plot
pheno_contrasts <- list(
  art  = c("arteriol_scler1", "arteriol_scler2", "arteriol_scler3"),
  caa  = c("caa_4gp1",        "caa_4gp2",        "caa_4gp3"),
  cvda = c("cvda_4gp21",      "cvda_4gp22",      "cvda_4gp23"),
  gct  = c("ci_num2_gct1"),
  mct  = c("ci_num2_mct1")
)

# 3. Create output folder
dir.create("output/volcano", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# 4. Loop over phenotypes → models → contrasts
for (pheno in names(tt_all_list)) {
  
  message("Processing phenotype: ", pheno)
  
  tt_all <- tt_all_list[[pheno]]
  contrasts <- pheno_contrasts[[pheno]]
  models <- names(tt_all)
  
  for (coef in contrasts) {
    message("  Contrast: ", coef)
    
    for (m in models) {
      tt_model <- tt_all[[m]]
      if (is.null(tt_model)) next
      
      # Build title: Phenotype full name + model
      contrast_num <- substr(coef, nchar(coef), nchar(coef))
      plot_title <- paste0(pheno_fullname[[pheno]], " – ", m, " – contrast: ", contrast_num)
      
      p <- create_volcano(tt_model, coef, plot_title)
      if (is.null(p)) next
      
      outfile <- paste0("output/volcano/", pheno, "_", m, "_", coef, ".png")
      ggsave(outfile, p, width = 6, height = 5)
    }
  }
}

```

```{r}
### Boxplot of specific genes
gene <-  tt_all_caa_basic[tt_all_caa_basic$adj.P.Val_caa_4gp3 < 0.05, "gene"] # This is the downregulated gene that has fdr < 0.05 at caa_4gp3 across four models
expr_df <- data.frame(
  expression = v_use_caa_basic$E[gene, ],
  stage = d_caa$samples$caa_4gp,
  sample = rownames(d_caa$samples)
)

ggplot(expr_df, aes(x = stage, y = expression, fill = stage)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_bw() +
  ggtitle(paste("Expression of", gene, "across four model at caa_4gp3")) +
  ylab("logCPM (voom)") +
  xlab("CAA stage")

```


```{r}
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
## SECTION 3.6 GSEA
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
library(rms)
library(reshape2)
library(stringr)
library(ggsci)
library(gplots)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggsci)
library(gridExtra)
library(data.table)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(gprofiler2)
library(rrvgo)
library(ggplot2)
library(GGally)
library(network)
library(sna)
library(ggnetwork)
library(ggraph)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(DOSE)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(enrichplot)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(GO.db)
library(dplyr)
library(fgsea)

```

```{r}
### Section 3.6.1 Data Loading 
# Load all tt_all objects produced by run_DE_models()

tt_all_caa  <- readRDS("~/Documents/BCB330/output/5_pheno/tt_all_caa.rds")
tt_all_art  <- readRDS("~/Documents/BCB330/output/5_pheno/tt_all_art.rds")
tt_all_cvda <- readRDS("~/Documents/BCB330/output/5_pheno/tt_all_cvda.rds")
tt_all_gct  <- readRDS("~/Documents/BCB330/output/5_pheno/tt_all_gct.rds")
tt_all_mct  <- readRDS("~/Documents/BCB330/output/5_pheno/tt_all_mct.rds")

```

```{r}

### Global Set-up for GSEA with GO:BP
gene_df_orig <- bitr(
  tt_all_caa$basic$hugo,
  fromType = "SYMBOL",
  toType = "ENTREZID",
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db
)

mapped <- gene_df_orig$SYMBOL
original <- names(tt_all_caa$basic$gene)
unmapped <- setdiff(original, mapped)
# Recover some alias gene failed to map genes
alias <- bitr( 
  unmapped,
  fromType = "ALIAS",
  toType = "ENTREZID",
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db
)

# library(HGNChelper)
# fixed <- HGNChelper::checkGeneSymbols(unmapped)
# updated <- fixed %>% filter(Approved == TRUE & !is.na(Suggested.Symbol))
# rescued_map <- bitr(
#   updated$Suggested.Symbol,
#   fromType = "SYMBOL",
#   toType = "ENTREZID",
#   OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db
# )

gene_df <- bind_rows(
  gene_df_orig,
  alias,
  # rescued_map
  ) %>% distinct(SYMBOL, .keep_all = TRUE) # remove all the duplicates

# Extract GO annotations from org.Hs.eg.db with corresponding entrezID
go_bp <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys = keys(org.Hs.eg.db, keytype = "ENTREZID"),
  columns = c("GO", "ONTOLOGY"),
  keytype = "ENTREZID"
) %>%
  dplyr::filter(ONTOLOGY == "BP") %>%
  dplyr::select(term = GO, gene = ENTREZID) %>%
  dplyr::distinct()

# Convert GOID to term name used in plots
# table contain GOID, pathway name , and ontology categories, use to convert GOID
bp_terms <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  GO.db,
  keys = keys(GO.db, keytype = "GOID"),
  columns = c("GOID", "TERM", "ONTOLOGY"),
  keytype = "GOID"
) |> dplyr::filter(ONTOLOGY == "BP")
# bp_terms

# helper: Rebuild geneList with ENTREZ IDs: convert gene symbol to entrezID
build_EntrezList <- function(tstat) {
  el <- tstat[gene_df$SYMBOL]
  names(el) <- gene_df$ENTREZID
  el <- sort(el, decreasing = TRUE)
  return (el)
}

### GSEA main function that uses GO:BP: Preprocss the tstat ranking first and then apply GSEA
run_GOBP_gsea_for_pheno <- function(tt_all,
                                    pheno_label,
                                    contrast_prefix,
                                    contrasts,
                                    go_bp,
                                    bp_terms,
                                    outdir = "output/GSEA") {
  
  pheno_dir <- file.path(outdir, pheno_label)
  dir.create(pheno_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  models <- names(tt_all)  # basic, lifestyle, AD, path
  
  # 1. Build t-stat lists per model and contrast
  tstat_list <- list()
  
  for (m in models) {
    df <- tt_all[[m]]
    if (is.null(df)) next
    
    # clean gene symbols
    df <- df[!is.na(df$hugo) & df$hugo != "", ]
    df <- df[!duplicated(df$hugo), ]
    
    # t-stat columns for this phenotype
    tstat_cols <- grep(paste0("^t_", contrast_prefix), colnames(df), value = TRUE)
    
    tstat_list[[m]] <- list()
    
    for (tcol in tstat_cols) {
      contrast_name <- sub("^t_", "", tcol)
      
      vec <- df[[tcol]]
      names(vec) <- df$hugo
      vec <- sort(vec, decreasing = TRUE)
      
      tstat_list[[m]][[contrast_name]] <- vec
    }
  }
  
  # 2. Build Entrez gene lists
  geneList_entrez <- list()
  
  for (m in models) {
    geneList_entrez[[m]] <- list()
    
    for (ct in contrasts) {
      tstat_vec <- tstat_list[[m]][[ct]]
      if (is.null(tstat_vec)) {
        geneList_entrez[[m]][[ct]] <- NULL
      } else {
        geneList_entrez[[m]][[ct]] <- build_EntrezList(tstat_vec)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # 3. Run GSEA BP
  GOBP_result <- list()
  
  for (m in models) {
    GOBP_result[[m]] <- list()
    
    for (ct in contrasts) {
      message("Running GSEA BP: ", pheno_label, " | model: ", m, " | contrast: ", ct)
      
      gl <- geneList_entrez[[m]][[ct]]
      if (is.null(gl) || length(gl) == 0) {
        message("geneList is empty")
        GOBP_result[[m]][[ct]] <- NULL
        next
      }
      
      res <- GSEA(
        geneList     = gl,
        TERM2GENE    = go_bp,
        minGSSize    = 15,
        maxGSSize    = 500,
        pvalueCutoff = 1,
        verbose      = FALSE
      )
      
      idx <- match(res@result$ID, bp_terms$GOID)
      res@result$Description <- bp_terms$TERM[idx]
      
      GOBP_result[[m]][[ct]] <- res
    }
  }
  
  # Save the full list 
  saveRDS(
    GOBP_result,
    file = file.path(pheno_dir, paste0("GOBP_", pheno_label, "_all_models.rds"))
  )
  
  return(GOBP_result)
}


GOBP_caa <- run_GOBP_gsea_for_pheno(
  tt_all          = tt_all_caa,
  pheno_label     = "caa",
  contrast_prefix = "caa_4gp",
  contrasts       = c("caa_4gp1", "caa_4gp2", "caa_4gp3"),
  go_bp           = go_bp,
  bp_terms        = bp_terms
)
GOBP_art <- run_GOBP_gsea_for_pheno(
  tt_all          = tt_all_art,
  pheno_label     = "art",
  contrast_prefix = "arteriol_scler",
  contrasts       = c("arteriol_scler1", "arteriol_scler2", "arteriol_scler3"),
  go_bp           = go_bp,
  bp_terms        = bp_terms
)
GOBP_cvda <- run_GOBP_gsea_for_pheno(
  tt_all          = tt_all_cvda,
  pheno_label     = "cvda",
  contrast_prefix = "cvda_4gp2",
  contrasts       = c("cvda_4gp21", "cvda_4gp22", "cvda_4gp23"),
  go_bp           = go_bp,
  bp_terms        = bp_terms
)
GOBP_gct <- run_GOBP_gsea_for_pheno(
  tt_all          = tt_all_gct,
  pheno_label     = "gct",
  contrast_prefix = "ci_num2_gct",
  contrasts       = "ci_num2_gct1",
  go_bp           = go_bp,
  bp_terms        = bp_terms
)
GOBP_mct <- run_GOBP_gsea_for_pheno(
  tt_all          = tt_all_mct,
  pheno_label     = "mct",
  contrast_prefix = "ci_num2_mct",
  contrasts       = "ci_num2_mct1",
  go_bp           = go_bp,
  bp_terms        = bp_terms
)

```

```{r}
### Load GOBP
GOBP_caa  <- readRDS("output/GSEA/caa/GOBP_caa_all_models.rds")
GOBP_art  <- readRDS("output/GSEA/art/GOBP_art_all_models.rds")
GOBP_cvda <- readRDS("output/GSEA/cvda/GOBP_cvda_all_models.rds")
GOBP_gct  <- readRDS("output/GSEA/gct/GOBP_gct_all_models.rds")
GOBP_mct  <- readRDS("output/GSEA/mct/GOBP_mct_all_models.rds")

```

```{r}
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
## SECTION 3.6.4: Result Summary 
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

# helper
extract_paths <- function(obj, fdr = 0.5) {
  df <- obj@result
  df <- df[df$p.adjust < fdr, ]

  up <- df$Description[df$NES > 0]
  down <- df$Description[df$NES < 0]

  # collapse into single strings
  up_str <- if (length(up) == 0) "" else paste(up, collapse = ", ")
  down_str <- if (length(down) == 0) "" else paste(down, collapse = ", ")

  list(up = up_str, down = down_str)
}

run_GOBP_summary_05 <- function(GOBP_result,
                                pheno_label,
                                contrasts,
                                outdir = "output/gsea_summary") {
  
  dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Initialize vectors
  contrast_vec  <- character()
  model_vec     <- character()
  up_vec        <- character()
  down_vec      <- character()
  up_count_vec  <- numeric()
  down_count_vec <- numeric()
  
  models <- names(GOBP_result)   # basic, lifestyle, AD, path
  
  for (m in models) {
    for (ct in contrasts) {
      
      res <- GOBP_result[[m]][[ct]]
      
      paths <- extract_paths(res, fdr = 0.05)
      
      # store up/down strings
      up_vec   <- c(up_vec,   paths$up)
      down_vec <- c(down_vec, paths$down)
      
      # store counts
      up_count_vec <- c(
        up_count_vec,
        if (paths$up == "") 0 else length(strsplit(paths$up, ", ")[[1]])
      )
      down_count_vec <- c(
        down_count_vec,
        if (paths$down == "") 0 else length(strsplit(paths$down, ", ")[[1]])
      )
      
      contrast_vec <- c(contrast_vec, ct)
      model_vec    <- c(model_vec, m)
    }
  }
  
  # Build summary tables 
  summary_table <- data.frame(
    phenotype     = pheno_label,
    fdr_threshold = "0.05",
    contrast      = contrast_vec,
    model         = model_vec,
    up            = up_vec,
    down          = down_vec,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  summary_count <- data.frame(
    phenotype     = pheno_label,
    fdr_threshold = "0.05",
    contrast      = contrast_vec,
    model         = model_vec,
    up            = up_count_vec,
    down          = down_count_vec,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Save results
  write.csv(
  summary_table,
  file.path(outdir, paste0("GOBP_", pheno_label, "_summary_table_05.csv")),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  summary_count,
  file.path(outdir, paste0("GOBP_", pheno_label, "_summary_count_05.csv")),
  row.names = FALSE
)

  # saveRDS(summary_table,
  #         file.path(outdir, paste0("GOBP_", pheno_label, "_summary_table_05.rds")))
  # 
  # saveRDS(summary_count,
  #         file.path(outdir, paste0("GOBP_", pheno_label, "_summary_count_05.rds")))
  
  # Return both tables
  return(list(
    table_05 = summary_table,
    count_05 = summary_count
  ))
}

caa_GOBP_summary <- run_GOBP_summary_05(GOBP_caa, "caa", c("caa_4gp1", "caa_4gp2", "caa_4gp3"))
art_GOBP_summary <- run_GOBP_summary_05(
  GOBP_art, "art", c("arteriol_scler1", "arteriol_scler2", "arteriol_scler3")
)
cvda_GOBP_summary <- run_GOBP_summary_05(
  GOBP_cvda, "cvda", c("cvda_4gp21", "cvda_4gp22", "cvda_4gp23")
)
gct_GOBP_summary <- run_GOBP_summary_05(
  GOBP_gct, "gct", "ci_num2_gct1"
)
mct_GOBP_summary <- run_GOBP_summary_05(
  GOBP_mct, "mct", "ci_num2_mct1"
)
```


```{r}
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
## SECTION 3.6.6 RRVGO
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
### RRVGO: reduce dimention of GSEA object for non-pair-wise contrarst

run_rrvgo <- function(gsea_obj,
                      pheno_label,
                      model_label,
                      contrast_label,
                      ontology = "BP",
                      threshold = 0.7,
                      outdir = "output/rrvgo") {
  
  # Create output directory
  dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  pheno_dir <- file.path(outdir, pheno_label)
  dir.create(pheno_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Extract GSEA result table
  res <- gsea_obj@result
  
  # Filter significant pathways
  res <- res[res$p.adjust < 0.05, ]
  
  if (nrow(res) == 0) {
    message("No significant GO terms — skipping RRVGO.")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Prepare terms and scores
  terms <- res$ID
  scores <- abs(res$NES)
  names(scores) <- terms
  
  # Compute similarity matrix
  simMatrix <- calculateSimMatrix(
    terms,
    orgdb = "org.Hs.eg.db",
    ont = ontology,
    method = "Rel"
  )
  
  # Remove GO terms with NA similarity
  valid_terms <- rownames(simMatrix)[rowSums(is.na(simMatrix)) < ncol(simMatrix)]
  simMatrix <- simMatrix[valid_terms, valid_terms, drop = FALSE]
  scores <- scores[valid_terms]
  
  # Save simMatrix for downstream analysis
  sim_file <- file.path(
    pheno_dir,
    paste0("RRVGO_", pheno_label, "_", model_label, "_", contrast_label, "_simMatrix.rds")
  )
  saveRDS(simMatrix, sim_file)
  
  # If fewer than 3 valid terms remain, skip RRVGO
  if (length(valid_terms) < 3) {
    message("Fewer than 3 valid GO terms after similarity filtering — skipping reduction.")
    
    # Save minimal reducedTerms
    reducedTerms <- data.frame(
      parent = valid_terms,
      term = valid_terms,
      score = scores,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    reduced_file <- file.path(
      pheno_dir,
      paste0("RRVGO_", pheno_label, "_", model_label, "_", contrast_label, "_reducedTerms.rds")
    )
    saveRDS(reducedTerms, reduced_file)
    
    return(list(
      simMatrix = sim_file,
      reducedTerms = reduced_file,
      heatmap = NULL,
      scatter = NULL
    ))
  }
  
  # Full RRVGO reduction
  reducedTerms <- reduceSimMatrix(
    simMatrix,
    scores,
    threshold = threshold,
    orgdb = "org.Hs.eg.db"
  )
  
  # Save reducedTerms
  reduced_file <- file.path(
    pheno_dir,
    paste0("RRVGO_", pheno_label, "_", model_label, "_", contrast_label, "_reducedTerms.rds")
  )
  saveRDS(reducedTerms, reduced_file)
  
  # Output filenames
  heatmap_file <- file.path(
    pheno_dir,
    paste0("RRVGO_", pheno_label, "_", model_label, "_", contrast_label, "_heatmap.png")
  )
  scatter_file <- file.path(
    pheno_dir,
    paste0("RRVGO_", pheno_label, "_", model_label, "_", contrast_label, "_scatter.png")
  )
  
  # Heatmap
  png(heatmap_file, width = 1600, height = 1200)
  invisible(heatmapPlot(simMatrix, reducedTerms, annotateParent=TRUE,
                        annotationLabel="parentTerm", fontsize=12))
  dev.off()
  
  # Scatter
  png(scatter_file, width = 1600, height = 1200)
  invisible(print(scatterPlot(simMatrix, reducedTerms, labelSize = 8)))
  dev.off()
  
  return(list(
    simMatrix = sim_file,
    reducedTerms = reduced_file
  ))
}

run_rrvgo(GOBP_caa$basic[["caa_4gp1"]], "caa", "basic", "caa_4gp1")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_caa$basic[["caa_4gp2"]], "caa", "basic", "caa_4gp2")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_caa$basic[["caa_4gp3"]], "caa", "basic", "caa_4gp3")

run_rrvgo(GOBP_caa$lifestyle[["caa_4gp1"]], "caa", "lifestyle", "caa_4gp1")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_caa$lifestyle[["caa_4gp2"]], "caa", "lifestyle", "caa_4gp2")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_caa$lifestyle[["caa_4gp3"]], "caa", "lifestyle", "caa_4gp3")

run_rrvgo(GOBP_caa$AD[["caa_4gp1"]], "caa", "AD", "caa_4gp1")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_caa$AD[["caa_4gp2"]], "caa", "AD", "caa_4gp2")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_caa$AD[["caa_4gp3"]], "caa", "AD", "caa_4gp3")

run_rrvgo(GOBP_caa$path[["caa_4gp1"]], "caa", "path", "caa_4gp1")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_caa$path[["caa_4gp2"]], "caa", "path", "caa_4gp2")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_caa$path[["caa_4gp3"]], "caa", "path", "caa_4gp3")

run_rrvgo(GOBP_art$basic[["arteriol_scler1"]], "art", "basic", "arteriol_scler1")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_art$basic[["arteriol_scler2"]], "art", "basic", "arteriol_scler2")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_art$basic[["arteriol_scler3"]], "art", "basic", "arteriol_scler3")

run_rrvgo(GOBP_art$lifestyle[["arteriol_scler1"]], "art", "lifestyle", "arteriol_scler1")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_art$lifestyle[["arteriol_scler2"]], "art", "lifestyle", "arteriol_scler2")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_art$lifestyle[["arteriol_scler3"]], "art", "lifestyle", "arteriol_scler3")

run_rrvgo(GOBP_art$AD[["arteriol_scler1"]], "art", "AD", "arteriol_scler1")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_art$AD[["arteriol_scler2"]], "art", "AD", "arteriol_scler2")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_art$AD[["arteriol_scler3"]], "art", "AD", "arteriol_scler3")

run_rrvgo(GOBP_art$path[["arteriol_scler1"]], "art", "path", "arteriol_scler1")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_art$path[["arteriol_scler2"]], "art", "path", "arteriol_scler2")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_art$path[["arteriol_scler3"]], "art", "path", "arteriol_scler3")

run_rrvgo(GOBP_cvda$basic[["cvda_4gp21"]], "cvda", "basic", "cvda_4gp21")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_cvda$basic[["cvda_4gp22"]], "cvda", "basic", "cvda_4gp22")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_cvda$basic[["cvda_4gp23"]], "cvda", "basic", "cvda_4gp23")

run_rrvgo(GOBP_cvda$lifestyle[["cvda_4gp21"]], "cvda", "lifestyle", "cvda_4gp21")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_cvda$lifestyle[["cvda_4gp22"]], "cvda", "lifestyle", "cvda_4gp22")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_cvda$lifestyle[["cvda_4gp23"]], "cvda", "lifestyle", "cvda_4gp23")

run_rrvgo(GOBP_cvda$AD[["cvda_4gp21"]], "cvda", "AD", "cvda_4gp21")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_cvda$AD[["cvda_4gp22"]], "cvda", "AD", "cvda_4gp22")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_cvda$AD[["cvda_4gp23"]], "cvda", "AD", "cvda_4gp23")

run_rrvgo(GOBP_cvda$path[["cvda_4gp21"]], "cvda", "path", "cvda_4gp21")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_cvda$path[["cvda_4gp22"]], "cvda", "path", "cvda_4gp22")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_cvda$path[["cvda_4gp23"]], "cvda", "path", "cvda_4gp23")

run_rrvgo(GOBP_mct$basic[["ci_num2_mct1"]], "mct", "basic", "ci_num2_mct1")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_mct$lifestyle[["ci_num2_mct1"]], "mct", "lifestyle", "ci_num2_mct1")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_mct$AD[["ci_num2_mct1"]], "mct", "AD", "ci_num2_mct1")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_mct$path[["ci_num2_mct1"]], "mct", "path", "ci_num2_mct1")

run_rrvgo(GOBP_gct$basic[["ci_num2_gct1"]], "gct", "basic", "ci_num2_gct1")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_gct$lifestyle[["ci_num2_gct1"]], "gct", "lifestyle", "ci_num2_gct1")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_gct$AD[["ci_num2_gct1"]], "gct", "AD", "ci_num2_gct1")
run_rrvgo(GOBP_gct$path[["ci_num2_gct1"]], "gct", "path", "ci_num2_gct1")

```


```{r}
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
## SECTION 3.6.5 Visualization of RRVGO Patwhays
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Visualize the top three parent term gsea plot (ranked by NES)

# helper
compute_rrvgo <- function(gsea_obj, ontology = "BP", threshold = 0.7) {
  
  res <- gsea_obj@result
  res <- res[res$p.adjust < 0.05, ]
  if (nrow(res) < 3) {
  message("Skipping RRVGO: fewer than 3 GO terms")
  return(NULL)
}
  
  terms <- res$ID
  scores <- abs(res$NES)
  names(scores) <- terms
  
  simMatrix <- calculateSimMatrix(
    terms,
    orgdb = "org.Hs.eg.db",
    ont = ontology,
    method = "Rel"
  )
  
  reducedTerms <- reduceSimMatrix(
    simMatrix,
    scores,
    threshold = threshold,
    orgdb = "org.Hs.eg.db"
  )
  
  reducedTerms
}

get_top3_terms <- function(reducedTerms) {
  reducedTerms |>
    dplyr::distinct(parent, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
    dplyr::arrange(desc(score)) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = 3) |>
    dplyr::pull(parent)
}

run_gseaplot2_all <- function(GOBP_list, pheno_label) {
  
  models <- names(GOBP_list)
  results_list <- list()
  
  for (model_label in models) {
    
    contrasts <- names(GOBP_list[[model_label]])
    
    for (contrast_label in contrasts) {
      
      message("Processing: ", pheno_label, " / ", model_label, " / ", contrast_label)
      
      gobj <- GOBP_list[[model_label]][[contrast_label]]
      if (is.null(gobj)) next
      
      # Compute RRVGO reduction on the fly
      reducedTerms <- compute_rrvgo(gobj)
      if (is.null(reducedTerms)) next
      
      # Extract top 3 parent terms
      top_terms <- get_top3_terms(reducedTerms)
      if (length(top_terms) == 0) next
      
      results_list[[length(results_list) + 1]] <- data.frame(
        phenotype = pheno_label,
        model = model_label,
        contrast = contrast_label,
        parent_term_1 = top_terms[1],
        parent_term_2 = top_terms[2],
        parent_term_3 = top_terms[3],
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      
      title_txt <- paste0(
        toupper(pheno_label), " – ",
        model_label, " – ",
        contrast_label
      )
      
      # Output directory
      outdir <- file.path("output/gseaplots", pheno_label)
      dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
      
      outfile <- file.path(
        outdir,
        paste0("GSEAplot_", pheno_label, "_", model_label, "_", contrast_label, ".png")
      )
      
      # Create and save plot
      p <- gseaplot2(
        x = gobj,
        geneSetID = top_terms,
        title = title_txt,
        base_size = 12
      )
      
      png(outfile, width = 2000, height = 1600, res = 150)
      print(p)
      dev.off()
    }
  }
  if (length(results_list) == 0) return(NULL)
  do.call(rbind, results_list)
}

all_results <- list()

all_results[["caa"]] <- run_gseaplot2_all(GOBP_caa, "caa")
all_results[["art"]] <- run_gseaplot2_all(GOBP_art, "art")
all_results[["cvda"]] <- run_gseaplot2_all(GOBP_cvda, "cvda")
all_results[["mct"]] <- run_gseaplot2_all(GOBP_mct, "mct")
all_results[["gct"]] <- run_gseaplot2_all(GOBP_gct, "gct")

# Combine into one table
top3_table <- do.call(rbind, all_results)

top3_long <- top3_table |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("parent_term_"),
    names_to = "rank",
    values_to = "GOID"
  )
top3_long <- top3_long |>
  dplyr::left_join(bp_terms, by = "GOID")

top3_long

write.csv(
  top3_long,
  file = "output/top3_rrvgo_parent_terms_all_phenotypes.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

```
